bio: Southside is a legendary multi-platinum record producer and the key architect of 808 Mafia. Pioneering the dark, aggressive, gritty trap sound that defined modern hip-hop, he has produced hits for Future, Drake, Travis Scott, Young Thug, and Lil Baby. This portal serves as the exclusive primary vault for unreleased custom stems and official enterprise beat licensing.
